prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic modern portrait of Esther reimagined in the present day, seated at a large worktable and leaning forward while sketching or annotating papers with a black pen. She has long, voluminous dark curly hair, medium olive-brown skin, and wears a soft light beige cardigan over a neutral tank top, layered delicate necklaces, and a simple ring. Her pose is candid and focused, with one hand writing and the other resting across a spread of maps, drawings, and printed pages on the table. Frame the image as a medium close-up from slightly above table height, centered on her upper body and hands. Use warm natural indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, and a softly blurred creative studio or workshop background with earthy brown and amber tones, giving the scene an intimate, thoughtful, contemporary storytelling mood. Emphasize realism, tactile skin and fabric texture, natural curls, documentary-style photography, subtle color grading, and a serious yet calm expression.
